articles.title: Disney+ Is Dropping a Treasure Chest of New Shows and Sports in May!
articles.summary: Imagine a month where Sofia the First returns with magic, Ladybug and Cat Noir get tiny, and you can watch live sports like the PGA Championship and a huge soccer match—all on Disney+!

articles.title: Soon Your Headphones Might Know When Your Brain Needs a Break!
articles.summary: Imagine headphones that can tell when you're getting tired or stressed, and then nudge you to take a break. A company called Neurable is making that real, and soon lots of gadgets might have this brain-scanning magic.

articles.title: Sinner Keeps Winning! He Ties a Record Only One Other Tennis Star Has Reached
articles.summary: Jannik Sinner just won his 20th match in a row! He beat Cameron Norrie at the Madrid Open and matched a record set by Novak Djokovic. Now he's in the quarter-finals and looking unstoppable.
